mapper.update: update work_flow_product set delete_flag=1 where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from work_flow_product where workflow_id=#{workflowId} and delete_flag!=1

select * from material JOIN work_flow_product ON work_flow_product.product_code=material.code where work_flow_product.delete_flag!=1 and material.delete_flag!=1 and work_flow_product.product_code=#{code} and work_flow_product.workflow_id=#{workflowId}

select * from unit JOIN material ON unit.id=material.unit_id JOIN work_flow_product ON work_flow_product.product_code=material.code where unit.delete_flag!=1 AND work_flow_product.delete_flag!=1 and material.delete_flag!=1 and work_flow_product.product_code=#{code} and work_flow_product.workflow_id=#{workflowId}
select * from work_flow_product where product_code=#{code} and workflow_id=#{workflowId} and delete_flag!=1
select * from work_flow_product where delete_flag!=1 and id=#{id}
select * from material where delete_flag!=1 and code=#{code}

select * from material_category join material on material_category.id=material.category_id WHERE material.category_id=#{cateId} and material.id=#{mId} and material_category.delete_flag!=1 and material_category.delete_flag!=1
select * from unit JOIN material ON material.unit_id=unit.id WHERE material.delete_flag!=1 and unit.delete_flag!=1 and material.id=#{mId} and material.unit_id=#{unId}
select * from work_flow_product where product_code=#{code} and workflow_id=#{workflowId} and delete_flag!=1
